prosperity.config.title: Prosperity Configuration
Give each player their own private loot from naturally-generated containers. Disable to fall back to vanilla shared loot.
prosperity.config.enable_visual_indicato: Show a gold sparkle above containers you have not yet looted.
prosperity.config.indicator_render_dista: Maximum distance, in blocks, at which unlooted indicators render. Fades out over the final 8 blocks.
prosperity.config.indicator_xray_distanc: Distance, in blocks, within which indicators render through walls. Beyond this they are occluded by terrain.
prosperity.config.enable_distance_scalin: Scale loot quality and stack sizes with distance from world origin.
prosperity.config.end_always_max_tier.to: Treat the End dimension as the highest distance tier regardless of coordinates.
prosperity.config.distance_tiers.tooltip: One tier per row as: name, minDistance, stackMultiplier, qualityModifier (e.g. wilderness, 3000, 2.0, 2). Malformed rows are dropped on save.
prosperity.config.structure_overrides.to: One override per row as: structure, mode, tier (e.g. minecraft:monument, fixed, wilderness). Mode is fixed, minimum, or maximum. Malformed rows are dropped on save.
Allow datapacks to additively inject extra entries into instanced loot.
prosperity.config.enable_structure_compl: Grant one extra injected reward, once per structure per player, for looting every instanced container in a multi-container structure.
prosperity.config.loot_table_blacklist.t: Loot table ids that stay vanilla (not instanced), one per row (e.g. minecraft:chests/spawn_bonus_chest).
prosperity.config.enable_loot_notificati: Show an action-bar message with tier and structure when you first open an instanced container.
prosperity.config.enable_loot_refresh.to: Let instanced containers regenerate their loot after a cooldown.
prosperity.config.loot_refresh_days.tool: In-game days before a looted container can refresh, when refresh is enabled.
prosperity.config.randomize_loot_on_refr: When a container refreshes, roll fresh loot instead of repeating the same items it held before.
prosperity.config.evict_absent_player_da: Drop a player's stored container data once they have been offline past the eviction threshold. Their uncollected loot is forfeit; if they return, containers regenerate fresh for them.
prosperity.config.absent_player_eviction: In-game days a player must be gone before their stored container data is evicted, when eviction is enabled.
prosperity.config.enable_container_prote: Slow down breaking of unlooted instanced containers.
prosperity.config.protection_break_multi: How much slower an unlooted instanced container is to break (1.0 = vanilla speed).
prosperity.config.protection_unbreakable: When container protection is on, make a container with unclaimed loot fully unbreakable in survival (and immune to explosions) instead of just slower. Creative players still break it.
prosperity.config.enable_mob_loot_scalin: Apply distance-tier scaling to mob drops as well as containers.
prosperity.config.enable_fishing_loot_sc: Apply distance-tier scaling to fishing catches, biasing toward treasure at higher tiers.
prosperity.config.enable_trial_chamber_s: Scale trial chamber vault loot and trial spawner rewards by the chamber's distance tier.
prosperity.config.party_loot_mode.toolti: Players on the same scoreboard team share one loot instance per container instead of each getting their own. Teamless players still get individual instances.
prosperity.config.team_leave_grace_minut: Minutes a player who just left a team keeps generating new shared instances against their former team's key (0 = off). Only applies while Party Loot Mode is on.
prosperity.config.show_indicators.toolti: Client toggle for rendering unlooted-container sparkles, independent of the server setting.
prosperity.config.enable_tier_hud.toolti: Show the distance-tier badge on the HUD.
prosperity.config.hud_anchor.tooltip: Screen corner the tier HUD badge anchors to.
prosperity.config.hud_offset_x.tooltip: Horizontal offset, in pixels, of the tier HUD badge from its anchor corner.
prosperity.config.hud_offset_y.tooltip: Vertical offset, in pixels, of the tier HUD badge from its anchor corner.
prosperity.item.prospectors_compass.tool: Points to the nearest container you haven't looted
hud.prosperity.loot_detail.title: Loot Detail

command.prosperity.reset.radius.all: Cleared instanced loot within %s blocks for all players (%s instances removed)
command.prosperity.reset.radius.player: Cleared %s's instanced loot within %s blocks (%s instances removed)
command.prosperity.refresh.radius.all: Refreshed loot within %s blocks for all players (%s instances cleared)
command.prosperity.refresh.radius.player: Refreshed %s's loot within %s blocks (%s instances cleared)
command.prosperity.reload: Reloaded Prosperity config and synced to %s player(s)

prosperity.notification.protected_unbrea: ⚠ This loot container can't be broken — open it to claim its loot
